sanitization: Only the ReproForge result and app connection metadata are visible; ChatGPT identity, profile, sidebar, history, cookies, credentials, private repositories, provider IDs, and customer data are excluded.
provenance: All captures are first-party ChatGPT screenshots from the connected production ReproForge MCP app; none are local previews, mockups, or generated images.
rights: Captured by the repository owner from their authorized ChatGPT session for product integration documentation; OpenAI and ChatGPT marks remain their owners' property.
openGates: The anonymous trusted-demo review case passed. Seven protected, private, intermittent, and negative hosted review cases plus portal submission and publication remain separate gates.
